name: Eclipse
subtitle: A source for the Eclipse fork.
description: Eclipse is a media app fork with anime, manga, light novel, download, and playback-focused additions. The app ships without services or addons.

apps.name: Eclipse
apps.subtitle: Anime, manga, downloads, and playback tools.
apps.localizedDescription: Eclipse is a fork of Luna with expanded anime handling, AniList and Trakt sync, catalogs, downloads, Stremio addon support, manga mode, light novel support, and playback improvements. The app does not include services or addons.

versions.localizedDescription: Release build with MAL tracker sync tools, safer HLS download handling, reader-mode gradient fixes, and update metadata refresh.
